variants.hook_text: Most women over 35 have blocked lymph — and blame everything else.
variants.ae_brief: Female 35-45, clinical setting, talks to camera, soft authority. 9:16, 8s, sound design subtle reveal.

variants.hook_text: You'll feel this neck stiffness for the rest of your life — unless someone tells you what it really is.
variants.ae_brief: Same archetype, more lean-in at midpoint. Sharp cut on 'really is'. 9:16, 8s.

variants.hook_text: Your morning swelling isn't water weight. It's stagnant lymph.
variants.ae_brief: Doctor in clinic, gestures at face, calm myth-bust tone. 9:16, 8s.
